summary: Iteration 55: Quick Reservation Write-Back feature testing. Backend APIs working correctly after fixing unique index issues (pnr and idempotency_key fields added). Frontend calendar day detail shows 'Rezervasyon Yap' buttons, dialog opens with hotel/room info. Full reservation flow verified via curl. Rate limiting affected some UI testing.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility concern

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/agency/reservations/quick creates reservation with all fields (hotel_name, agency_name, total_price, status=confirmed, pnr, idempotency_key)
Backend: Reservation stored correctly in DB with correct structure
Backend: Allotment decremented in hotel_inventory_snapshots after reservation (from 7 to 6)
Backend: Write-back job queued in sheet_writeback_queue collection
Backend: GET /api/agency/reservations lists reservations with hotel_id filter
Backend: POST /api/agency/reservations/{id}/cancel changes status to cancelled
Backend: Double cancel returns 409 conflict
Backend: Invalid date format returns 400
Backend: 401 returned without auth token
Backend: Cancel non-existent reservation returns 404
Frontend: Hotels page shows 4 hotels with 'Detay & Takvim' buttons
Frontend: Hotel detail page loads with 'Envanter Takvimi' calendar
Frontend: Calendar shows Mart 2026 with room prices and allotments
Frontend: Day click (Mar 25) expands detail panel showing 3 room types
Frontend: Room cards show Fiyat (price), Kontenjan (allotment), 'Rezervasyon Yap' button
Frontend: Suite shows 'Satış Durduruldu' badge (0 allotment, no reserve button)
Frontend: 'Rezervasyon Yap' button opens 'Hızlı Rezervasyon' dialog
Frontend: Dialog shows hotel name, room type, date, price/night, available rooms
Frontend: Dialog has form fields: Misafir Adı, Telefon, E-posta, Kişi Sayısı, Gece Sayısı
Frontend: Dialog calculates and displays Çıkış date and Toplam price
Frontend: Dialog has İptal and Rezervasyon Oluştur buttons
Frontend: Sidebar TOPLAM counter visible (shows 2 reservations)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added 'pnr' field (QR-{uuid8}) to reservation document - required by unique index organization_id_1_pnr_1
FIXED: Added 'idempotency_key' field to reservation document - required by unique index organization_id_1_idempotency_key_1
Good: Calendar day detail shows room cards with Fiyat, Kontenjan, and conditional Rezervasyon Yap button
Good: Suite with 0 allotment shows 'Satış Durduruldu' badge instead of reserve button
Good: QuickReservationDialog calculates checkout date and total price dynamically
Good: Write-back job is queued with unique source_id for idempotency
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby - accessibility improvement suggested

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI verified, form submission tested indirectly due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Created test reservations during testing (TEST_Curl_Guest, TEST_Ahmet_Yılmaz) for hotel b54305a3-d21b-4758-b86b-3a176c447c63
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified Quick Reservation flow: (1) Backend APIs POST /api/agency/reservations/quick, GET /api/agency/reservations, POST /api/agency/reservations/{id}/cancel all working, (2) Reservation creates with pnr and idempotency_key fields for unique indexes, (3) Allotment auto-decrements on create and restores on cancel, (4) Write-back job queued in sheet_writeback_queue (actual sheet write depends on sheet credentials), (5) Calendar day detail has 'Rezervasyon Yap' buttons per room type, (6) QuickReservationDialog opens with hotel/room info and calculates prices. Test hotel: b54305a3-d21b-4758-b86b-3a176c447c63 (Demo Hotel 1). Test date used: 2026-03-25.

mocked_apis.notes: Write-back to actual Google Sheet is queued but not processed - the queue entry exists in sheet_writeback_queue collection. This is expected behavior as sheet credentials may not work in preview environment.
